Union Station.name: Union Station
Union Station.description: You are in Union Station, the busiest transit hub in Canada, connecting GO Transit, VIA Rail, and the TTC. The crowd moves endlessly around you. TMU station is NorthEast and Museum station is NorthWest.

items.name: PRESTO CARD
items.description: A small black card used to pay for transit. Funds are limited.

TMU Station.name: TMU Station
TMU Station.description: You step out into the busy downtown core near Toronto Metropolitan University. Students rush past, and the city hums with energy. Streetcars rattle nearby.

items.name: TMU ID CARD
items.description: Your student ID card for TMU.

items.name: Screwdriver
items.description: A small tool that could be useful in the future.

Bloor-Yonge Station.name: Bloor-Yonge Station
Bloor-Yonge Station.description: You are currently in Canada Busiest Subway Station. From here you can connect to Line 2 Bloor-Danforth. East to Kennedy and West to Kipling.

Eglinton.name: Eglinton Station
Eglinton.description: You are currently in Toronto's newest subway station with connection to Line 5 Eglinton. You can go east to Kennedy and west to Mount Dennis.
